---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-12"
---
```{r}
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("lme4")
install.packages("lmerTest")
install.packages("emmeans")
install.packages("effectsize")
install.packages("ggplot2")
install.packages("patchwork")
install.packages("car")
```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS: OPINION DYNAMICS & POLARIZATION
# CORRECTED VERSION - Aligned with Research Hypotheses
# 4 Conditions: Null, Tie-cutting, Repulsion+Tiecut, Repulsion
# ==============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(effectsize)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(car)

# ============================ CONFIGURATION ============================

OUTPUT_DIR <- "/work/files/simulation/results"
ANALYSIS_DIR <- "/work/files/simulation/analysis_final"
FIGURES_DIR <- file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "figures")

dir.create(ANALYSIS_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(FIGURES_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

TERMINAL_TICKS <- seq(8000, 9000, by = 50)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
options(contrasts = c("contr.sum", "contr.poly"))

# ============================ LOAD DATA ============================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("LOADING SIMULATION DATA\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

history_files <- list.files(OUTPUT_DIR, 
                            pattern = "history\\.csv$", 
                            recursive = TRUE, 
                            full.names = TRUE)

cat(sprintf("Found %d history files\n", length(history_files)))

df_full <- map_dfr(history_files, function(file) {
  
  parts <- strsplit(file, "/")[[1]]
  run_folder <- parts[length(parts) - 1]
  condition_folder <- parts[length(parts) - 2]
  
  seed <- as.integer(sub("run_", "", run_folder))
  
  # Parse 4 conditions
  if (grepl("^null_", condition_folder)) {
    condition <- "null"
    remainder <- sub("^null_", "", condition_folder)
  } else if (grepl("^repulsion_tiecut_", condition_folder)) {
    condition <- "repulsiontiecut"
    remainder <- sub("^repulsion_tiecut_", "", condition_folder)
  } else if (grepl("^repulsion_", condition_folder)) {
    condition <- "repulsion"
    remainder <- sub("^repulsion_", "", condition_folder)
  } else if (grepl("^tiecut_", condition_folder)) {
    condition <- "tiecut"
    remainder <- sub("^tiecut_", "", condition_folder)
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  matches <- str_match(remainder, "^(er|smallworld|ba)_eps([0-9.]+)$")
  network <- matches[2]
  epsilon <- as.numeric(matches[3])
  
  read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      condition = condition,
      network = network,
      epsilon = epsilon,
      seed = seed
    )
}, .progress = TRUE)

cat(sprintf("\nLoaded %d total observations\n", nrow(df_full)))
cat(sprintf("Unique runs: %d\n", n_distinct(df_full$condition, df_full$network, 
                                             df_full$epsilon, df_full$seed)))

# ============================ DATA PREPARATION ============================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("DATA PREPARATION\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

df_terminal <- df_full %>%
  filter(tick %in% TERMINAL_TICKS) %>%
  group_by(condition, network, epsilon, seed) %>%
  summarise(
    global_distance = mean(global_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    polarization_ratio = mean(polarization_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    within_bloc_dist = mean(within_bloc_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
    between_bloc_dist = mean(between_bloc_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
    edges = mean(edges, na.rm = TRUE),
    components = mean(components, na.rm = TRUE),
    density = mean(density, na.rm = TRUE),
    modularity = mean(modularity, na.rm = TRUE),
    local_agreement = mean(local_agreement, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_terminal <- df_terminal %>%
  mutate(
    condition = factor(condition, 
                      levels = c("null", "tiecut", "repulsiontiecut", "repulsion"),
                      labels = c("Null", "Tie-cutting", "Repulsion+Tiecut", "Repulsion")),
    network = factor(network, 
                    levels = c("er", "smallworld", "ba"),
                    labels = c("ER", "Small-world", "BA")),
    epsilon = as.numeric(epsilon),
    seed = factor(seed)
  )

cat("Terminal values extracted (ticks 8000-9000)\n")
cat(sprintf("Conditions: %s\n", paste(levels(df_terminal$condition), collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Networks: %s\n", paste(levels(df_terminal$network), collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Epsilon values: %.2f, %.2f\n", min(df_terminal$epsilon), max(df_terminal$epsilon)))
cat(sprintf("Seeds: %d unique\n\n", nlevels(df_terminal$seed)))

sample_sizes <- df_terminal %>%
  count(network, condition, epsilon) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = epsilon, values_from = n, names_prefix = "eps_", values_fill = 0)

cat("Sample sizes by condition:\n")
print(sample_sizes)
cat("\n")

# ============================ PRIMARY DATASET ============================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("PRIMARY ANALYSIS: SMALL-WORLD NETWORK\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

cat("Rationale:\n")
cat("  - Small-world networks approximate real social structures\n")
cat("  - High clustering + short path lengths\n")
cat("  - Validated for political discussion networks\n\n")

df_primary <- df_terminal %>%
  filter(network == "Small-world") %>%
  droplevels()

cat(sprintf("Primary dataset: %d observations\n", nrow(df_primary)))
cat(sprintf("  - Conditions: %d\n", nlevels(df_primary$condition)))
cat(sprintf("  - Seeds: %d\n", nlevels(df_primary$seed)))
cat(sprintf("  - Epsilon levels: %d\n\n", length(unique(df_primary$epsilon))))

# ==============================================================================
# RQ1 / H1: GLOBAL OPINION DISPERSION
# ==============================================================================

cat(rep("-", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("RQ1: Do disagreement response mechanisms differentially affect \n")
cat("     global opinion dispersion?\n")
cat(rep("-", 80), "\n\n")

cat("HYPOTHESES:\n")
cat("  H1a: Pure repulsion produces HIGHEST global dispersion\n")
cat("       (Repulsion > Null & Tie-cutting)\n")
cat("  H1b: Pure tie-cutting produces dispersion EQUIVALENT to null\n")
cat("       (Tie-cutting ≈ Null)\n")
cat("  H1c: Combined condition produces INTERMEDIATE dispersion\n")
cat("       (Null < Repulsion+Tiecut < Repulsion)\n\n")

h1_model <- lmer(global_distance ~ condition + (1|seed), data = df_primary)

cat("--- MODEL SUMMARY ---\n")
print(summary(h1_model))
cat("\n")

h1_anova <- anova(h1_model)
cat("--- ANOVA (Type III) ---\n")
print(h1_anova)
cat("\n")

h1_eta <- eta_squared(h1_anova, partial = TRUE)
cat("--- EFFECT SIZE (Partial η²) ---\n")
print(h1_eta)
cat("\n")

h1_emm <- emmeans(h1_model, ~ condition)
cat("--- ESTIMATED MARGINAL MEANS ---\n")
print(h1_emm)
cat("\n")

h1_pairs <- pairs(h1_emm, adjust = "bonferroni")
cat("--- PAIRWISE CONTRASTS (Bonferroni) ---\n")
print(h1_pairs)
cat("\n")

h1_cohens <- eff_size(h1_emm, sigma = sigma(h1_model), edf = df.residual(h1_model))
cat("--- COHEN'S d ---\n")
print(h1_cohens)
cat("\n")

# Hypothesis tests
h1_df <- as.data.frame(h1_emm)
null_gd <- h1_df$emmean[h1_df$condition == "Null"]
tiecut_gd <- h1_df$emmean[h1_df$condition == "Tie-cutting"]
reptie_gd <- h1_df$emmean[h1_df$condition == "Repulsion+Tiecut"]
rep_gd <- h1_df$emmean[h1_df$condition == "Repulsion"]

cat("--- HYPOTHESIS EVALUATION ---\n")

# H1a: Repulsion > Null AND Repulsion > Tie-cutting
h1a_test <- rep_gd > null_gd && rep_gd > tiecut_gd
cat(sprintf("H1a (Repulsion > Null & Tie-cutting): %.3f > %.3f & %.3f\n",
            rep_gd, null_gd, tiecut_gd))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", ifelse(h1a_test, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H1b: Tie-cutting ≈ Null (difference < 2% of scale)
h1b_diff <- abs(tiecut_gd - null_gd)
h1b_test <- h1b_diff < 0.02
cat(sprintf("H1b (Tie-cutting ≈ Null): |%.3f - %.3f| = %.4f\n",
            tiecut_gd, null_gd, h1b_diff))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", ifelse(h1b_test, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H1c: Null < Repulsion+Tiecut < Repulsion
h1c_test <- null_gd < reptie_gd && reptie_gd < rep_gd
cat(sprintf("H1c (Null < Rep+Tiecut < Repulsion): %.3f < %.3f < %.3f\n",
            null_gd, reptie_gd, rep_gd))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", ifelse(h1c_test, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

write_csv(as.data.frame(h1_anova), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h1_anova.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(h1_emm), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h1_emmeans.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(h1_pairs), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h1_contrasts.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(h1_cohens), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h1_cohens_d.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# RQ2 / H2: TOLERANCE MODERATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("-", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("RQ2: Does tolerance for disagreement moderate the effects of \n")
cat("     disagreement response mechanisms?\n")
cat(rep("-", 80), "\n\n")

cat("HYPOTHESES:\n")
cat("  H2a: Lower tolerance amplifies pure repulsion's polarizing effect\n")
cat("       (ε=0.40 > ε=0.50 for Repulsion)\n")
cat("  H2b: Lower tolerance amplifies tie-cutting's fragmentation\n")
cat("       (without affecting opinion dispersion)\n")
cat("  H2c: Lower tolerance amplifies combined condition's effect\n")
cat("       (ε=0.40 > ε=0.50 for Repulsion+Tiecut)\n")
cat("  H2d: Significant Condition × Epsilon interaction\n")
cat("       (stronger moderation for repulsion-containing conditions)\n\n")

h2_model <- lmer(global_distance ~ condition * epsilon + (1|seed), data = df_primary)

cat("--- MODEL SUMMARY ---\n")
print(summary(h2_model))
cat("\n")

h2_anova <- anova(h2_model)
cat("--- ANOVA (Type III) ---\n")
print(h2_anova)
cat("\n")

h2_eta <- eta_squared(h2_anova, partial = TRUE)
cat("--- EFFECT SIZE ---\n")
print(h2_eta)
cat("\n")

h2_emm <- emmeans(h2_model, ~ condition | epsilon)
cat("--- ESTIMATED MARGINAL MEANS (by Epsilon) ---\n")
print(h2_emm)
cat("\n")

h2_eps_contrasts <- emmeans(h2_model, pairwise ~ epsilon | condition)
cat("--- EPSILON EFFECTS WITHIN CONDITIONS ---\n")
print(h2_eps_contrasts$contrasts)
cat("\n")

h2_df <- as.data.frame(h2_emm)

cat("--- HYPOTHESIS EVALUATION ---\n\n")

# H2a: Repulsion shows epsilon effect
rep_040 <- h2_df %>% filter(condition == "Repulsion", epsilon == 0.40) %>% pull(emmean)
rep_050 <- h2_df %>% filter(condition == "Repulsion", epsilon == 0.50) %>% pull(emmean)
h2a_delta <- rep_040 - rep_050
h2a_pval <- h2_eps_contrasts$contrasts %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  filter(condition == "Repulsion") %>% 
  pull(p.value)

cat(sprintf("H2a (Repulsion: ε=0.40 > ε=0.50): %.3f vs %.3f (Δ=%+.3f, p=%.4f)\n",
            rep_040, rep_050, h2a_delta, h2a_pval))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", 
            ifelse(h2a_delta > 0 && h2a_pval < 0.05, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H2b: Tie-cutting shows minimal epsilon effect on dispersion
tie_040 <- h2_df %>% filter(condition == "Tie-cutting", epsilon == 0.40) %>% pull(emmean)
tie_050 <- h2_df %>% filter(condition == "Tie-cutting", epsilon == 0.50) %>% pull(emmean)
h2b_delta <- tie_040 - tie_050
h2b_pval <- h2_eps_contrasts$contrasts %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  filter(condition == "Tie-cutting") %>% 
  pull(p.value)

cat(sprintf("H2b (Tie-cutting: minimal ε effect): %.3f vs %.3f (Δ=%+.3f, p=%.4f)\n",
            tie_040, tie_050, h2b_delta, h2b_pval))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", 
            ifelse(abs(h2b_delta) < 0.02 || h2b_pval > 0.05, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H2c: Repulsion+Tiecut shows epsilon effect
reptie_040 <- h2_df %>% filter(condition == "Repulsion+Tiecut", epsilon == 0.40) %>% pull(emmean)
reptie_050 <- h2_df %>% filter(condition == "Repulsion+Tiecut", epsilon == 0.50) %>% pull(emmean)
h2c_delta <- reptie_040 - reptie_050
h2c_pval <- h2_eps_contrasts$contrasts %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  filter(condition == "Repulsion+Tiecut") %>% 
  pull(p.value)

cat(sprintf("H2c (Rep+Tiecut: ε=0.40 > ε=0.50): %.3f vs %.3f (Δ=%+.3f, p=%.4f)\n",
            reptie_040, reptie_050, h2c_delta, h2c_pval))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", 
            ifelse(h2c_delta > 0 && h2c_pval < 0.05, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H2d: Interaction significant
int_pval <- h2_anova["condition:epsilon", "Pr(>F)"]
int_f <- h2_anova["condition:epsilon", "F value"]

cat(sprintf("H2d (Condition × Epsilon interaction): F=%.2f, p=%.4f\n", int_f, int_pval))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", 
            ifelse(int_pval < 0.05, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

write_csv(as.data.frame(h2_anova), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h2_anova.csv"))
write_csv(h2_df, file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h2_emmeans.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(h2_eps_contrasts$contrasts), 
          file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h2_epsilon_effects.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# RQ3 / H3: BLOC POLARIZATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("-", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("RQ3: Do disagreement response mechanisms increase bloc polarization?\n")
cat(rep("-", 80), "\n\n")

cat("HYPOTHESES:\n")
cat("  H3a: Pure repulsion increases bloc polarization (PR > 1.0)\n")
cat("  H3b: Pure tie-cutting increases bloc polarization (PR > 1.0)\n")
cat("  H3c: Combined condition produces intermediate PR\n")
cat("       (Tie-cutting < Repulsion+Tiecut < Repulsion)\n")
cat("  H3d: Pure repulsion produces HIGHEST PR\n\n")

cat("Note: PR = Between-bloc distance / Within-bloc distance\n")
cat("      PR > 1.0 indicates between-bloc distance exceeds within-bloc cohesion\n\n")

h3_model <- lmer(polarization_ratio ~ condition + (1|seed), data = df_primary)

cat("--- MODEL SUMMARY ---\n")
print(summary(h3_model))
cat("\n")

h3_anova <- anova(h3_model)
cat("--- ANOVA (Type III) ---\n")
print(h3_anova)
cat("\n")

h3_eta <- eta_squared(h3_anova, partial = TRUE)
cat("--- EFFECT SIZE ---\n")
print(h3_eta)
cat("\n")

h3_emm <- emmeans(h3_model, ~ condition)
cat("--- ESTIMATED MARGINAL MEANS ---\n")
print(h3_emm)
cat("\n")

h3_pairs <- pairs(h3_emm, adjust = "bonferroni")
cat("--- PAIRWISE CONTRASTS ---\n")
print(h3_pairs)
cat("\n")

h3_test <- test(h3_emm, null = 1.0, side = ">")
cat("--- ONE-SAMPLE TESTS (PR > 1.0) ---\n")
print(h3_test)
cat("\n")

h3_df <- as.data.frame(h3_emm)
null_pr <- h3_df$emmean[h3_df$condition == "Null"]
tiecut_pr <- h3_df$emmean[h3_df$condition == "Tie-cutting"]
reptie_pr <- h3_df$emmean[h3_df$condition == "Repulsion+Tiecut"]
rep_pr <- h3_df$emmean[h3_df$condition == "Repulsion"]

cat("--- HYPOTHESIS EVALUATION ---\n\n")

# H3a: Repulsion PR > 1.0
h3a_pval <- h3_test$p.value[h3_test$condition == "Repulsion"]
cat(sprintf("H3a (Repulsion PR > 1.0): PR=%.3f, p=%.4f\n", rep_pr, h3a_pval))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", 
            ifelse(rep_pr > 1.0 && h3a_pval < 0.05, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H3b: Tie-cutting PR > 1.0
h3b_pval <- h3_test$p.value[h3_test$condition == "Tie-cutting"]
cat(sprintf("H3b (Tie-cutting PR > 1.0): PR=%.3f, p=%.4f\n", tiecut_pr, h3b_pval))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", 
            ifelse(tiecut_pr > 1.0 && h3b_pval < 0.05, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H3c: Ordering
h3c_test <- tiecut_pr < reptie_pr && reptie_pr < rep_pr
cat(sprintf("H3c (Tie-cutting < Rep+Tiecut < Repulsion): %.3f < %.3f < %.3f\n",
            tiecut_pr, reptie_pr, rep_pr))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", ifelse(h3c_test, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

# H3d: Repulsion = maximum
h3d_test <- rep_pr == max(h3_df$emmean)
cat(sprintf("H3d (Repulsion = max PR): PR=%.3f (max=%.3f)\n", rep_pr, max(h3_df$emmean)))
cat(sprintf("     Result: %s\n\n", ifelse(h3d_test, "✓ SUPPORTED", "✗ NOT SUPPORTED")))

write_csv(as.data.frame(h3_anova), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h3_anova.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(h3_emm), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h3_emmeans.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(h3_pairs), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h3_contrasts.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(h3_test), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "h3_test_vs_1.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# SUPPLEMENTARY ANALYSES
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("SUPPLEMENTARY ANALYSES\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

# Network fragmentation
cat("--- NETWORK FRAGMENTATION ---\n\n")

edges_model <- lmer(edges ~ condition + (1|seed), data = df_primary)
edges_emm <- emmeans(edges_model, ~ condition)
cat("Edges (network connectivity):\n")
print(edges_emm)
cat("\n")

components_model <- lmer(components ~ condition + (1|seed), data = df_primary)
components_emm <- emmeans(components_model, ~ condition)
cat("Components (network fragmentation):\n")
print(components_emm)
cat("\n")

modularity_model <- lmer(modularity ~ condition + (1|seed), data = df_primary)
modularity_emm <- emmeans(modularity_model, ~ condition)
cat("Modularity (bloc-based segregation):\n")
print(modularity_emm)
cat("\n")

write_csv(as.data.frame(edges_emm), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "edges_emmeans.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(components_emm), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "components_emmeans.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(modularity_emm), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "modularity_emmeans.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# ROBUSTNESS CHECK: NETWORK TOPOLOGY
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("ROBUSTNESS CHECK: NETWORK TOPOLOGY EFFECTS\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

robust_model <- lmer(global_distance ~ condition * network + (1|seed), data = df_terminal)

robust_anova <- anova(robust_model)
cat("--- ANOVA (Condition × Network) ---\n")
print(robust_anova)
cat("\n")

robust_emm <- emmeans(robust_model, ~ condition | network)
cat("--- EMMs BY NETWORK TYPE ---\n")
print(robust_emm)
cat("\n")

int_pval_robust <- robust_anova["condition:network", "Pr(>F)"]
if (int_pval_robust < 0.05) {
  cat("⚠ WARNING: Significant Condition × Network interaction detected\n")
  cat("   Interpretation: Mechanism effects vary by network topology\n\n")
} else {
  cat("✓ No significant Condition × Network interaction\n")
  cat("  Primary findings robust across network topologies\n\n")
}

write_csv(as.data.frame(robust_anova), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "robustness_anova.csv"))
write_csv(as.data.frame(robust_emm), file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "robustness_emmeans.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# MODEL DIAGNOSTICS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("MODEL DIAGNOSTICS\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

check_assumptions <- function(model, data, dv_name, model_name) {
  
  cat(sprintf("\n--- DIAGNOSTICS: %s ---\n\n", model_name))
  
  # 1. Normality of residuals
  resids <- residuals(model)
  sw_test <- shapiro.test(resids)
  cat(sprintf("Shapiro-Wilk (residuals): W=%.4f, p=%.4f %s\n", 
              sw_test$statistic, sw_test$p.value,
              ifelse(sw_test$p.value > 0.05, "✓", "⚠")))
  
  # Q-Q plot
  png(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, sprintf("%s_qqplot.png", model_name)),
      width = 800, height = 600, res = 150)
  qqnorm(resids, main = sprintf("Q-Q Plot: %s", model_name))
  qqline(resids, col = "red", lwd = 2)
  dev.off()
  
  # 2. Homogeneity of variance
  lev_test <- tryCatch({
    leveneTest(as.formula(paste(dv_name, "~ condition")), data = data)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  
  if (!is.null(lev_test)) {
    cat(sprintf("Levene's test: F=%.4f, p=%.4f %s\n", 
                lev_test$`F value`[1], lev_test$`Pr(>F)`[1],
                ifelse(lev_test$`Pr(>F)`[1] > 0.05, "✓", "⚠")))
  }
  
  # 3. ICC
  vc <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(model))
  var_seed <- vc$vcov[vc$grp == "seed"]
  var_resid <- vc$vcov[vc$grp == "Residual"]
  icc <- var_seed / (var_seed + var_resid)
  cat(sprintf("ICC: %.4f (%.1f%% variance from seed clustering) %s\n\n", 
              icc, icc * 100, ifelse(icc > 0.05, "✓", "⚠")))
  
  invisible(list(shapiro = sw_test, levene = lev_test, icc = icc))
}

diag_h1 <- check_assumptions(h1_model, df_primary, "global_distance", "H1")
diag_h2 <- check_assumptions(h2_model, df_primary, "global_distance", "H2")
diag_h3 <- check_assumptions(h3_model, df_primary, "polarization_ratio", "H3")

diag_summary <- tibble(
  Hypothesis = c("H1", "H2", "H3"),
  DV = c("Global Distance", "Global Distance", "Polarization Ratio"),
  Shapiro_p = c(diag_h1$shapiro$p.value, diag_h2$shapiro$p.value, diag_h3$shapiro$p.value),
  Levene_p = c(
    ifelse(!is.null(diag_h1$levene), diag_h1$levene$`Pr(>F)`[1], NA),
    ifelse(!is.null(diag_h2$levene), diag_h2$levene$`Pr(>F)`[1], NA),
    ifelse(!is.null(diag_h3$levene), diag_h3$levene$`Pr(>F)`[1], NA)
  ),
  ICC = c(diag_h1$icc, diag_h2$icc, diag_h3$icc)
) %>%
  mutate(
    Normality = ifelse(Shapiro_p > 0.05, "Pass", "Fail"),
    Homogeneity = ifelse(Levene_p > 0.05 | is.na(Levene_p), "Pass", "Fail")
  )

cat("DIAGNOSTIC SUMMARY:\n")
print(diag_summary)
cat("\n")

write_csv(diag_summary, file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "diagnostics_summary.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# VISUALIZATIONS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("GENERATING FIGURES\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

# Color palette
cond_colors <- c(
  "Null" = "gray60",
  "Tie-cutting" = "steelblue",
  "Repulsion+Tiecut" = "orange",
  "Repulsion" = "red3"
)

# ============================ FIGURE 1: H1 - Global Distance ============================

fig_h1 <- ggplot(as.data.frame(h1_emm), aes(x = condition, y = emmean, fill = condition)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cond_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "H1: Global Opinion Dispersion by Mechanism",
    subtitle = sprintf("Small-world networks (N = %d per condition)", 
                       nrow(df_primary) / nlevels(df_primary$condition)),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Global Distance (estimated marginal mean)"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_h1_global_distance.png"),
       fig_h1, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ============================ FIGURE 2: H2 - Tolerance Interaction ============================

fig_h2 <- ggplot(h2_df, aes(x = factor(epsilon), y = emmean, 
                            color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, shape = 19) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "H2: Tolerance Moderation Effect",
    subtitle = "Condition × Epsilon interaction on global opinion dispersion",
    x = "Tolerance Threshold (ε)",
    y = "Global Distance (estimated marginal mean)",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_h2_interaction.png"),
       fig_h2, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ============================ FIGURE 3: H3 - Polarization Ratio ============================

fig_h3 <- ggplot(as.data.frame(h3_emm), aes(x = condition, y = emmean, fill = condition)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray30", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cond_colors) +
  annotate("text", x = 3.5, y = 1.05, label = "Neutral (PR = 1.0)",
           hjust = 0, size = 3.5, color = "gray30") +
  labs(
    title = "H3: Bloc Polarization (Polarization Ratio)",
    subtitle = "PR = Between-bloc distance / Within-bloc distance",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Polarization Ratio (PR)"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_h3_polarization_ratio.png"),
       fig_h3, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ============================ FIGURE 4: Bloc Distance Decomposition ============================

fig4_data <- df_primary %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(within_bloc_dist, between_bloc_dist),
    names_to = "distance_type",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    distance_type = case_when(
      distance_type == "within_bloc_dist" ~ "Within-bloc distance",
      distance_type == "between_bloc_dist" ~ "Between-bloc distance",
      TRUE ~ distance_type
    )
  )


fig_decomp <- ggplot(fig4_data, aes(x = condition, y = value, fill = distance_type)) +
  geom_violin(position = position_dodge(width = 0.85), alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.85), width = 0.15,
               outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.85, option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    title = "Mechanisms of Bloc Polarization",
    subtitle = "Between-bloc separation vs. within-bloc cohesion",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Opinion Distance",
    fill = "Distance Type"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_bloc_decomposition.png"),
       fig_decomp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ============================ FIGURE 5: Network Fragmentation ============================

fig_edges <- ggplot(as.data.frame(edges_emm), aes(x = condition, y = emmean)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkgreen", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.65) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 900, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    title = "Network Connectivity",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Edges (mean)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11)
  )

fig_components <- ggplot(as.data.frame(components_emm), aes(x = condition, y = emmean)) +
  geom_col(fill = "purple", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.65) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Network Fragmentation",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Components (mean)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11)
  )

fig_frag <- fig_edges + fig_components +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Network Structural Outcomes",
    subtitle = "Small-world networks",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11)
    )
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_fragmentation.png"),
       fig_frag, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# ============================ FIGURE 6: Trajectory Over Time ============================

traj_data <- df_full %>%
  filter(network == "smallworld") %>%
  group_by(tick, condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gd = mean(global_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_gd = sd(global_distance, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = factor(condition,
                      levels = c("null", "tiecut", "repulsiontiecut", "repulsion"),
                      labels = c("Null", "Tie-cutting", "Repulsion+Tiecut", "Repulsion"))
  )

fig_traj <- ggplot(traj_data, aes(x = tick, y = mean_gd, color = condition)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_gd - 1.96 * se_gd,
                  ymax = mean_gd + 1.96 * se_gd,
                  fill = condition),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cond_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Polarization Dynamics Over Time",
    subtitle = "Small-world networks (95% CI ribbons)",
    x = "Simulation Tick",
    y = "Mean Global Opinion Distance",
    color = "Condition",
    fill = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_trajectory.png"),
       fig_traj, width = 11, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ============================ FIGURE 7: Robustness Check ============================

fig_robust <- ggplot(as.data.frame(robust_emm), 
                    aes(x = condition, y = emmean, fill = network)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.85), alpha = 0.8, width = 0.75) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.85), width = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title = "Robustness Check: Network Topology",
    subtitle = "Condition effects across different network structures",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Global Distance (estimated marginal mean)",
    fill = "Network Type"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_robustness.png"),
       fig_robust, width = 11, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ============================ FIGURE 8: Terminal Distributions ============================

fig_dist <- ggplot(df_primary, aes(x = condition, y = global_distance, fill = condition)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cond_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Terminal Global Distance Distribution",
    subtitle = "Small-world networks (violin + boxplot)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Terminal Global Opinion Distance"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES_DIR, "fig_distribution.png"),
       fig_dist, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)

cat("✓ All figures saved to:", FIGURES_DIR, "\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
# ==============================================================================

cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

summary_table <- df_primary %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    GD_Mean = round(mean(global_distance), 3),
    GD_SD = round(sd(global_distance), 3),
    PR_Mean = round(mean(polarization_ratio), 3),
    PR_SD = round(sd(polarization_ratio), 3),
    Within_Mean = round(mean(within_bloc_dist), 3),
    Between_Mean = round(mean(between_bloc_dist), 3),
    Edges_Mean = round(mean(edges), 0),
    Components_Mean = round(mean(components), 1),
    Modularity_Mean = round(mean(modularity), 3),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(summary_table)
cat("\n")

write_csv(summary_table, file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "summary_table.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# HYPOTHESIS SUMMARY TABLE
# ==============================================================================

hypothesis_summary <- tibble(
  RQ = c("RQ1", "RQ1", "RQ1", "RQ2", "RQ2", "RQ2", "RQ2", 
         "RQ3", "RQ3", "RQ3", "RQ3"),
  Hypothesis = c("H1a", "H1b", "H1c", "H2a", "H2b", "H2c", "H2d",
                 "H3a", "H3b", "H3c", "H3d"),
  Description = c(
    "Repulsion produces highest dispersion",
    "Tie-cutting ≈ Null dispersion",
    "Null < Rep+Tie < Repulsion ordering",
    "Lower ε amplifies repulsion effect",
    "Lower ε has minimal effect on tie-cutting",
    "Lower ε amplifies combined effect",
    "Significant Condition × Epsilon interaction",
    "Repulsion PR > 1.0",
    "Tie-cutting PR > 1.0",
    "Tie-cutting < Rep+Tie < Repulsion ordering",
    "Repulsion produces highest PR"
  ),
  Result = c(
    ifelse(h1a_test, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(h1b_test, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(h1c_test, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(h2a_delta > 0 && h2a_pval < 0.05, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(abs(h2b_delta) < 0.02 || h2b_pval > 0.05, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(h2c_delta > 0 && h2c_pval < 0.05, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(int_pval < 0.05, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(rep_pr > 1.0 && h3a_pval < 0.05, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(tiecut_pr > 1.0 && h3b_pval < 0.05, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(h3c_test, "Supported", "Not Supported"),
    ifelse(h3d_test, "Supported", "Not Supported")
  )
)

cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("HYPOTHESIS TESTING SUMMARY\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")
print(hypothesis_summary)
cat("\n")

write_csv(hypothesis_summary, file.path(ANALYSIS_DIR, "hypothesis_summary.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n\n")

cat("Output directory:", ANALYSIS_DIR, "\n\n")

cat("Files saved:\n")
cat("  CSV outputs:\n")
cat("    - h1_anova.csv, h1_emmeans.csv, h1_contrasts.csv, h1_cohens_d.csv\n")
cat("    - h2_anova.csv, h2_emmeans.csv, h2_epsilon_effects.csv\n")
cat("    - h3_anova.csv, h3_emmeans.csv, h3_contrasts.csv, h3_test_vs_1.csv\n")
cat("    - edges_emmeans.csv, components_emmeans.csv, modularity_emmeans.csv\n")
cat("    - robustness_anova.csv, robustness_emmeans.csv\n")
cat("    - diagnostics_summary.csv\n")
cat("    - summary_table.csv\n")
cat("    - hypothesis_summary.csv\n\n")

cat("  Figures:\n")
cat("    - fig_h1_global_distance.png\n")
cat("    - fig_h2_interaction.png\n")
cat("    - fig_h3_polarization_ratio.png\n")
cat("    - fig_bloc_decomposition.png\n")
cat("    - fig_fragmentation.png\n")
cat("    - fig_trajectory.png\n")
cat("    - fig_robustness.png\n")
cat("    - fig_distribution.png\n")
cat("    - H1_qqplot.png, H2_qqplot.png, H3_qqplot.png\n\n")

cat(rep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
cat("✓ READY FOR THESIS REPORTING\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n")

```
